failure_modes.text: Pre-suasion can cross into manipulation when associative priming is decoupled from the actual merits of the proposal.
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit every priming move against the substance it leads to: if the associative frame would not survive scrutiny of the actual evidence, the pre-suasion has crossed into manipulation.

failure_modes.text: Availability and confirmation dynamics can make the audience more vulnerable to the wrong mental bucket once attention has been primed badly.
failure_modes.mitigation: After any priming exposure, run a de-biasing check: ask what the audience would conclude if they had encountered the proposal without the preceding context.

failure_modes.text: Trust can break if the expectations created during the priming stage are not matched by the substance that follows.
failure_modes.mitigation: Match promises to delivery: track whether the expectations set during the priming stage are fulfilled by the subsequent substance, and flag any trust-damaging gap.

premortem_questions.text: Can I make a great pitch?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Can I make a great pitch?

premortem_questions.text: Which association are we trying to prime, and would that association still be fair if the audience slowed down and analyzed the proposal?
What proof will the audience need after the emotional sale so the idea can survive contact with System 2?

heuristics.text: Guide preliminary attention to the concept you want associated with the message before you make the ask.
Use an emotional sale for the live moment and reserve detailed documents for the later proof burden.
heuristics.source_quote: The Emotional Sale vs. Rational Proof

heuristics.text: Choose a simple, sticky, high-context frame so the audience has a mental bucket before the details arrive.

curation_notes.summary: The intervention layer stays on salience shaping, associative preparation, and proof-after-priming discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broad persuasion tactic sprawl because the raw source is strongest on attention setup and anti-manipulation boundaries.
open_questions: The first premortem prompt is sourced from the interrogative self-talk mitigation rather than from the core playbook section.

allies: The source is rich on framing, storytelling, analogies, empathy, and MECE-supported structure.
antagonists: The raw source explicitly names scientific-method-evidence-testing and intellectual-humility style antagonism.
structured_tensions: The source explicitly preserves a structured tension against scientific-method-evidence-testing.
